docs.title: H3 Official Documentation
docs.description: Minimal H(TTP) framework built for high performance and portability. Web-standards-based, works on Node.js, Deno, Bun, and edge runtimes. Core of the UnJS ecosystem (Nitro, Nuxt).

docs.title: H3 Getting Started
docs.description: Quick-start guide covering installation, basic routing, event handling, and request/response utilities.

docs.title: H3 API Reference
docs.description: Complete API reference for the H3 app factory, event handlers, response helpers, and error handling.

docs.title: H3 on UnJS
docs.description: H3 package overview on the UnJS ecosystem site with links to related packages.
